
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{},{},{}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"__typename":"Employee"}},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"id":1},"path":["products",0,"lead"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"derivedMood":"HAPPY"},"path":["products",0,"lead"]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
